The title is "bikini babe" but trustttt this is any pov 🙏

This is hilarious 😭:

moving on,

Long. Ass. Caption. I'll add headers to organize the topics 😭

LEAVING REQUESTS IN REVIEWS

I've added a new block to the caption cause I'm so tired of this happening 💔

I fairly picky when it comes to writing, and I feel like I've made it abundantly clear that everything I write is self-indulgent 🥲

I've expressed recently that I don't really like receiving requests in the reviews (it was also in a lot of my past captions but I accidentally forgot to add it in my newer ones). But even then, people still leave suggestions in the reviews 😭

Y'ALL. IT'S AWKWARD. IT'S LITERALLY SO PAINFUL TO CRANK OUT: "maybe..." "oooo, perhaps", etc. ESPECIALLY IN THE REVIEW SECTION WHERE EVERYONE CAN SEE 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭😭

It's especially worse when people start replying or talking about it being like "oh I love this!" "this has to be a bot" and so on. Meanwhile, I have no interest 🚶‍♀️

Like I said, I'm soooo picky when it comes to writing intros, and I know damn well I look like an ASS replying to everyone but a certain comment 🏌‍♀️

I'm just very awkward y'all, these are things I overthink to the max

I've tried just deleting these kinda of reviews in the past but almost everytime the person comes back with "j.ai deleted my comment but I..." LIKE BRO NOOOOO NOT AGAIN PLEASE 😭😭😭😭

It's not like I'm seething with rage, so please don't feel too hurt if anything I've talked about applies to you, I'm just saying going forward you are 100% getting ignored/deleted cause I do this thing where if someone leaves a review that I feel like I can't reply to (ex: a request) I don't reply to anyone else above that comment 🥲 and that's just not fair to everyone else

(not all the time tho, sometimes I just get really busy since I usually post bots before class)

Plus what makes requests in reviews even more annoying is that almost always the person leaving said review hasn't read the rules and leaves gross stuff 🏌‍♀️

Side note, don't go under a bot of some random character asking "where's {{char}}??"/"when are you posting {{char}}?" I don't have a schedule, I just post what I wanttttt 😭😭

I HAVE BOT SUGGESTION RULES

I know y'all are sick and TIRED of me talking about this and trust me I am too.

I have rules for bot suggestions!

Some of these are:

  • A list of chars that I exclusively write for

  • Writing prompts I will not write

  • Things to consider when sending in a suggestion

  • I do not take requests for a bot to be remade to fit a different pov

  • I only write fem or any pov

I just don't understand how I am still getting suggestions that don't fit my rules when you HAVE to scroll past them to type one??? Plus, I talk about this so frequently it's actually driving me insane 😓

I am not going to just change my rules just because someone asked! You're just gonna get ignored, so don't show up in my dms or other reviews asking why a bot wasn't done 😭😭??? Those rules were written for a REASON, like hello why does this have to be explained 🚶‍♀️

QUESTIONS?
